title: Doorashooyinka Maalgelinta
askAiPrompt: Waxaan u baahanahay talo maalgelin. Dakhliga: {revenue}/bishii, faa'iidada saafiga ah: {netProfit}/bishii, lacag caddaan: {cash}, la-sugayaasha: {receivables}. Awoodda ugu badan ee amaah: ~{maxBorrow}. Doorashada maalgelinta ee ii fiican xaaladdayda waa tee?
calcAffordabilityWarning: Bixintu waxay ka badan tahay 40% faa'iidada saafiga ah ee bishii — tixgeli muddo dheer ama qadar yar
optionRevenueBasedDesc: Bixi % go'an oo dakhliga maalinlaha/toddobaadlaha ah. Dabacsan — bixintu waxay le'ekaataa iibka.
optionRevenueBasedBestFor: Ganacsiyada dakhligoodu xilliyeed ama isbeddel badan yahay
optionInvoiceDesc: Iibi qaansheegyada aan la bixin lacag isla markiiba (caadi ahaan 80-90% qiimaha guud).
optionInvoiceBestFor: Ganacsiyada B2B ee leh la-sugayaal furan
optionTermLoanDesc: Bixinno bille go'an muddo la cayimay. U wanaagsan maalgelinta la qorsheeyay.
optionOverdraftDesc: Amaah dabacsan oo ilaa xad ah. Kaliya bixi dulsaarka waxaad isticmaasho.
optionAssetDesc: Maalgeli qalab ama gaadiid gaar ah. Hantidu waxay u shaqeysaa dammaanad.
